evals.name: retry-on-transient-error

assertions.text: throws APICallError with isRetryable: true from ai
returns a content array with a { type: 'text', text: ... } part
finishReason is an object with unified field, not a bare string
uses model.doGenerateCalls.length to sequence the two responses (preferred over manual callIndex)
asserts model was called exactly twice

evals.name: stream-tool-call-with-input-deltas
evals.prompt: Write a node:test integration test that uses `ai/test` to mock a model that STREAMS a tool call with progressively streamed tool-input arguments (the Anthropic-style input streaming pattern). The test should verify that a tool called 'search' ends up with a final input of {"query":"weather"} after streaming. Use streamText. Don't actually run the tool — just assert that the tool call arrived with the right parsed input. Show me a complete, runnable test file.

assertions.text: emits tool-input-start chunk with id and toolName
emits tool-input-delta chunks with delta field (not textDelta)
emits final tool-call chunk with stringified JSON input
emits finish chunk with finishReason object and unified: 'tool-calls'
does NOT include obsolete rawCall field in the doStream return value
matching ids across tool-input-start/delta/end and tool-call
